title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION - 211info
text: JEFFERSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program offers home visiting and case management services. 500 NE A Street Suite 102 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Oregon MothersCare: Pregnant women at any stage of pregnancy Perinatal Care Coordination: Pregnant women; new moms and babies Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 475-4456 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 475-4456 Main phone (541) 475-2201 Non-Emergency After-Hours Main phone (541) 475-4456 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST!
